response.extracted_text: The Knowledge Explosion and Emerging Technologies Medical knowledge now doubles every 73 days. No clinician can absorb this volume through traditional learning alone— AI-assisted tools, clinical decision support, and continuous digital literacy are no longer optional. Knowledge Doubling From every 50 years to every 73 days—an exponential curve demanding new learning infrastructure AI & Clinical Tools Diagnostics, predictive analytics, and ambient documentation are reshaping the point of care Innovation Leadership Clinicians must guide technology adoption—not merely receive it—to ensure safety and value
response.layout_description: The slide is split vertically, with a large lab/technology photo occupying the left portion and a white content area on the right. The right side contains a large title at the top, a paragraph beneath it, and three stacked callout rows with pale chevron-shaped icon panels and blue text.
response.slide_title: The Knowledge Explosion and Emerging Technologies
text_blocks: The Knowledge Explosion and Emerging Technologies

Medical knowledge now doubles every 73 days. No clinician can absorb this volume through traditional learning alone— AI-assisted tools, clinical decision support, and continuous digital literacy are no longer optional.
Knowledge Doubling From every 50 years to every 73 days—an exponential curve demanding new learning infrastructure
AI & Clinical Tools Diagnostics, predictive analytics, and ambient documentation are reshaping the point of care
Innovation Leadership Clinicians must guide technology adoption—not merely receive it—to ensure safety and value
